text:
# awesome-utils

A collection of utility functions for Node.js.

## Installation

```bash
npm install awesome-utils
```

## Usage

```javascript
const { slugify } = require('awesome-utils');
```

text:
# express-validator

An express.js middleware for validator.js.

## Installation

```bash
npm install express-validator
```

## Quick Start

```javascript
const { body, validationResult } = require('express-validator');
```

## License

MIT
label: benign
